nasb.text: “What do you want Me to do for you?” And he said, “Lord, I want to regain my sight!”

esv.text: “What do you want me to do for you?” He said, “Lord, let me recover my sight.”

cnv.text: “你要我為你作甚麼？”他說：“主啊，叫我能看見！”

ccb.text: “你要我为你做什么？” 他说：“主啊！我想能够看见。”

csbs.text: “你要我为你做什么呢？” 他说：“主啊，我要重见光明！”
